---
title: "Day 6: Florence - Pitti Palace & Departure Prep"
subtitle: "Final Florence Day"
date: "2026-06-10"
day-of-week: "Tuesday"
location: "Florence"
categories: [itinerary, florence, museums]
---

## Overview

**Last full day in Florence** - Pitti Palace, Boboli Gardens, final museums/shopping, prepare for Naples tomorrow

---

## Morning: Palazzo Pitti & Boboli Gardens (9 AM-1 PM)

**Palatine Gallery:**
- Raphael, Titian paintings
- Royal Apartments
- Medici treasures

**Boboli Gardens:**
- 16th-century formal gardens
- Escape from museum crowds
- Shaded walks, fountains, views
- Bring water, comfortable shoes

**Time:** 2-3 hours total (or more if leisurely)

---

## Afternoon: Final Florence Activities (2-6 PM)

**Options:**

**Museum (if not done):**
- San Marco (Fra Angelico)
- Palazzo Vecchio

**Shopping:**
- Final souvenirs
- Leather goods, olive oil, wine
- Paper products, art supplies

**Relaxation:**
- Café in favorite piazza
- Final gelato (#4-5?)
- People-watching

---

## Evening: Farewell Florence (6-10 PM)

**Aperitivo:** Return to favorite spot

**Dinner:** Special last Florence meal
- Bistecca if not done yet?
- Or favorite trattoria from the week

**After Dinner:**
- Evening stroll through center
- See Duomo lit up at night
- Final photos

**Pack for Naples:** Train departs tomorrow morning

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Palazzo Pitti/Boboli visit
- [ ] Final shopping complete
- [ ] Souvenirs packed carefully
- [ ] Hotel bill reviewed (check for errors)
- [ ] Train tickets for Naples confirmed
- [ ] Packed and ready for morning checkout
- [ ] Set alarm for early wake-up

---

**Previous:** [Day 5](day-05-2026-06-08-florence.qmd) | **Next:** [Day 7: Florence to Naples](day-07-2026-06-10-florence-to-naples.qmd)
